    • getContextHypothesis

      public IPOPredicateSet getContextHypothesis()
      Description copied from interface: IMachineHypothesisManager
      Returns the hypothesis, i.e. the predicate set, that contains all predicates of the seen contexts.
      Specified by:
      getContextHypothesis in interface IMachineHypothesisManager
      Returns:
      the hypothesis that contains all predicates of the seen contexts
